calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Saronyx, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee
CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Melvin Patterson, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Abdullatif Binshukur,

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Dennis Lanfear for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $70,000.00

Costs - $415.00
Total judgment in the amount of $170,415.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
